LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-02-2021 HEARING RE: THE UNOPPOSED "VERIFIED APPLICATION FOR ADMISSION OF JOHN KAEMPF TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR DEFENDANT JOHN ROCHEM," THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR NO. 7855, EMAIL: ERIC.THRONE.CSR@GMAIL.COM, TEL: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JOHN ROCHE'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed "verified application for admission of John Kaempf to appear as counsel pro hac vice for defendant John Roche" is granted.

Counsel for the movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)
